# AI Dev Toolkit

> Reusable patterns, drop-in rules, portable skills, and cross-tool setup automation for AI-assisted development. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, OpenCode, Windsurf, and Antigravity.

Key capabilities:
- 15 tool-agnostic workflow patterns
- 18 portable skills for autonomous development
- 12 specialty agents with org chart and fallback chains
- Cross-tool installer (forge-kit) with interactive setup wizard
- Autonomous loop engine with governance gates

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/README.md): Quick start, forge-kit usage, agent system overview, quality checks
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Release history and version details
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute patterns, implementations, and fixes

## Patterns

- [Context Building](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/patterns/context-building.md): Structure project knowledge so agents find it instead of guessing
- [Task Orchestration](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/patterns/task-orchestration.md): Multi-step autonomous execution with checkpoints
- [Code Review](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/patterns/code-review.md): AI-assisted review for bugs, security, and logic defects
- [Testing with AI](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/patterns/testing.md): Test generation, TDD workflows, coverage analysis
- [Multi-Model Routing](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/patterns/multi-model-routing.md): Route tasks to the right model tier by complexity
- [Memory Systems](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/patterns/memory-systems.md): Cross-session persistence for decisions and preferences
- [Session Management](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/patterns/session-management.md): Parallel session handling and context recovery
- [Spec Driven Development](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/patterns/spec-driven-development.md): Stable contracts before implementation
- [Agent Gotchas](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/patterns/agent-gotchas.md): Common AI workflow failure modes and fixes

## Core Configs

- [Agents](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/kit/core/agents.json): 12 specialty agents with org chart, fallback chains, tool access
- [Routing](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/kit/core/routing.json): Complexity classifier, tier escalation, provider model maps
- [Loop](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/kit/core/loop.json): Autonomous dev cycle definition with governance gates
- [Autopilot](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/kit/core/autopilot.json): Autonomy levels, guardrails, durable execution
- [Hooks](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/kit/core/hooks.json): PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Session, Commit, Push hooks
- [Token Optimization](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/kit/core/token-optimization.json): Context compaction presets and cost tracking
- [MCP Servers](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/kit/core/mcp.json): 10 recommended MCP servers with profiles and agent mapping
- [Providers](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/kit/core/providers.json): Multi-provider model registry

## Reference Implementations

- [Claude Code](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/implementations/claude-code/README.md): Setup guide for Claude Code
- [Codex CLI](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/implementations/codex/README.md): Setup guide for Codex
- [OpenCode](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/implementations/opencode/README.md): Setup guide for OpenCode with oh-my-openagent
- [Cursor](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/implementations/cursor/README.md): Setup guide for Cursor
- [Windsurf](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/implementations/windsurf/README.md): Setup guide for Windsurf
- [Antigravity](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/implementations/antigravity/README.md): Setup guide for Antigravity

## Optional

- [Tools README](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/blob/main/tools/README.md): Curated productivity stack, install scripts, plugin recommendations
- [Best Practices](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/tree/main/best-practices): Security, workflow, and context management standards
- [Companies](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/tree/main/companies): Pre-built multi-agent organizations
- [Examples](https://github.com/LucasSantana-Dev/ai-dev-toolkit/tree/main/examples): Starter assets for backlog and memory structure
